positioning.commercial_one_liner: We help companies keep AI automation without letting silent premium-model defaults destroy ROI.
positioning.target_buyer: Enterprise teams deploying background agents, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude, OpenAI automation
buyer_pain: Auto model selection defaults to expensive models (o1, Claude 3.5, GPT-4o) without intent
Premium inference modes silently activated on routine tasks
Background agents consume quota without visibility
Shared API keys break spend attribution across applications
Cheap models fail; expensive models invoked as automatic recovery (cost leak)
Workflow leakage: GitHub Actions, Copilot, Cursor, Claude, OpenAI debit same budget
Unattributed automation spend; finance cannot tie costs to outcomes
positioning.value_promise: Transparent AI spend ledger + cost-safe routing policies + ROI restored

modules.name: AI Spend Leak Audit
deliverables: Spend surface map (APIs, agents, embedded models, fallbacks)
Model usage breakdown (which models, frequency, by task/workflow)
Cost attribution (tie spend to outcomes, automation tasks, teams)
Leak zone identification (auto-escalations, silent premium defaults, shared-key bleed)
ROI leakage estimate (quantify margin impact from unattributed spend)

modules.name: Premium Model Firewall
deliverables: Model policy (cost-safe defaults per task: routine=fast/cheap, complex=pay-as-needed)
Escalation gates (when/how to escalate to premium models)
Budget caps (hard limits per service, team, workflow)
Fallback policy (graceful degradation when cheap models hit limits)
API key isolation (namespace credentials by application, audit trail per key)

modules.name: Automation Cost Ledger
deliverables: Real-time cost per automation (track spend for each agent invocation)
Model selection reasoning (log why given model was chosen)
Approval trail (who approved premium escalations, when, why)
Monthly cost summary (spend by automation, model tier, team)
Anomaly detection (flag unexpected spend patterns, spike events)

modules.name: Model ROI Router
modules.description: Align model selection to business outcomes
deliverables: ROI target setting (acceptable cost-per-outcome per automation task)
Smart routing (select cheapest model meeting outcome quality bar)
A/B cost comparison (cost difference between model choices)
Outcome tracking (tie model selection to success metrics)
Recommendation engine (suggest model downgrades when cheaper models work)
modules.output_format: ROI Router Recommendations + Cost Savings Forecast

modules.name: Premium Escalation Policy
modules.description: Earn the right to expensive models
deliverables: Escalation thresholds (when cheap models insufficient)
Approval workflow (human + policy-based gates before premium use)
Cost-benefit analysis (show ROI of premium vs. outcome quality)
Spend tracking (monitor premium escalation rate, cost per escalation)
Governance trail (full audit log: who, why, when, outcome)

what_this_is_not: Not a payment custody or banking service
Not a PSP (Payment Service Provider) or MSB (Money Services Business)
Not a full agentic platform (governance + audit service only)
Not a deployment platform (recommends; customers deploy/operate)
Not financial advisory (operational cost control, not investment advice)
Not a replacement for CFO/Finance teams
Not a substitute for budget authority
what_this_is: Governance + audit + policy layer for AI cost control
Operational intelligence (spend surface, attribution, anomaly detection)
Policy enforcement toolkit (model routing, escalation gates, budget caps)
Transparency and auditability for AI automation spend

alignment.sg_note: Service remains governance-only pre-execution layer. No payment, settlement, custody, or banking authority claims. Policy enforcement in customer systems, not Noetfield infrastructure.
alignment.noos_status: DRAFT (not ready for notification until reconciliation complete)
alignment.noos_coordination: NOOS to be notified after service draft review and reconciliation clear

notes.status_summary: Service draft prepared and documented. All artifacts in repo. Awaiting reconciliation complete and stakeholder review before publication. Non-claims verified (governance-only, no payment/banking authority).
notes.publication_blocker: Noetfield repo must reconcile with origin/main, Vercel live state verified, NOOS updated with lane receipt, and founder approval obtained before service goes live to www.noetfield.com
